bugs.report_text: The page container fails to fill the full viewport height, leaving empty space and incomplete visual coverage.
bugs.pos_code: <div className="min-h-scren bg-white font-sans text-gray-900 flex flex-col-reverse">

bugs.report_text: The page content is displaying in reverse order, with footer elements appearing at the top and header-like content at the bottom.
bugs.pos_code: <div className="min-h-scren bg-white font-sans text-gray-900 flex flex-col-reverse">

bugs.report_text: The header navigation is hidden behind other page elements and becomes non-interactive and inaccessible.
bugs.neg_code: <nav className="flex items-center justify-between flex-wrap bg-white p-6 shadow-sm sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80">
bugs.pos_code: <header className="fixed w-full bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-sm -z-50 border-b border-gray-100">

bugs.report_text: The navigation links are invisible against the background, making the menu unreadable and preventing user navigation.
bugs.neg_code: <a key={link} href="#" className="block py-2 md:py-0 px-3 md:px-0 rounded-md text-gray-600 hover:text-indigo-600 font-medium transition-colors">

bugs.report_text: The main heading appears abnormally small and breaks the expected visual hierarchy of the page.
bugs.neg_code: <h1 className="text-5xl md:text-7xl font-extrabold text-gray-900 tracking-tight mb-6">
bugs.pos_code: <h1 className="text-5xl md:text-6x font-extrabold text-gray-900 tracking-tight mb-6">

bugs.report_text: The feature cards are stacked in a single column at all screen sizes instead of expanding into multiple columns on larger screens.
The feature cards are touching each other without any spacing between them, creating a crowded and visually cluttered appearance.
The 'Popular' badge is stuck at the top of the screen and remains visible while scrolling the page content.
bugs.neg_code: <div className="mb-4 px-4 py-2 bg-indigo-600 text-white rounded-full inline-block text-sm font-semibold">
bugs.pos_code: <span className="fixed top-0 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 bg-blue-500 text-white px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-sm font-bold shadow-lg">

bugs.report_text: The pricing amount text is invisible against the background, making the price unreadable and preventing customers from viewing the cost.
bugs.pos_code: $49/mo

bugs.report_text: The feature section heading is too close to the feature cards below, creating a cramped visual appearance without adequate breathing room.
bugs.pos_code: Everything you need
